summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with production experience building NLP and LLM-powered systems for document understanding, entity extraction, and classification. Fine-tuned a DistilBERT transformer for text classification achieving 99.1% F1, built a document ingestion pipeline with PDF parsing, MD5 deduplication, and Claude-based entity extraction deployed in production, and developed a full RAG system using LangChain, OpenAI embeddings, and Pinecone with scalable data preprocessing and inference pipelines. Experienced with PyTorch, MLOps on Docker and Kubernetes, and the full ML lifecycle from feature engineering through cloud-native deployment on AWS and GCP.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: NLP, Document Intelligence, Entity Extraction, Text Classification, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace Transformers, Model Fine-tuning, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, LangGraph, LLMs, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Prompt Engineering, SHAP, Model Evaluation, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, MLOps, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
